arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Max Eberl sheds light on Leroy Sané’s contract talks
arts.sum: When asked whether the reason for the lack of activity was due to Sané’s large wage bill, Eberl denied any decision being made. There has been a ton of speculation around Leroy Sané, whose Bayern Munich contract is set to expire in the summer.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane refuses to get carried away with first leg UCL victory over “dangerous” Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: The Bavarians would keep riding the momentum all the way to the end of the match, which finished 3-0. The first goal was a bit out of nowhere, wasn’t a big chance, but we took that moment and I feel like we grew into the game,” Kane said, as captured by @iMiaSanMia .

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen’s Granit Xhaka irate over penalty call in loss to Bayern Munich
arts.sum: When Bayer Leverkusen’s Edmond Tapsoba was whistled for a penalty after hauling down Harry Kane in the box, Granit Xhaka immediately thought the call was nonsense. “In the Premier League, he [Michael Oliver] doesn’t give that.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Weekend Warm-up Show Season 4, Episode 34: Unpacking Bayern Munich’s 3-0 win over Bayer Leverkusen; Is Jonas Urbig up to replacing Manuel Neuer?; What’s going with Joshua Kimmich; and MORE!
arts.sum: Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany. Let’s talk about everything going on at the moment on the Bavarian Podcast Works — Weekend Warm-up Show:

arts.ttl: Kimmich REJECTS Arsenal and Liverpool interest to extend Bayern Munich contract
arts.sum: Kimmich’s current contract is set to expire this summer and there had been speculation that Bayern were ready to withdraw their renewal offer to the 30-year-old and allow him to become a free agent after he stalled on signing the extension. Davies had been expected to leave Bayern on a free this summer after rejecting numerous contracts and receiving a significant offer from Real Madrid but the Canadian opted to sign a five-year extension in February.

arts.ttl: Jonas Urbig talks his dramatic Bayern Munich debut in the Champions League against Leverkusen
arts.sum: Having sat down on the bench in the match against Bayer Leverkusen, expecting an evening filled with the sole challenge of keeping warm on a frigid winter day, an unbelievable number of emotions must have been coursing through Urbig as Manuel Neuer signaled he could not continue to play. Speaking after the match, Urbig acknowledged the emotions coursing through him but settled on explaining just two, concern and excitement.

arts.ttl: Report: Things are looking good for a Joshua Kimmich renewal with Bayern Munich after recent meeting
arts.sum: Regarding Joshua Kimmich’s contract extension, after new talks today, things are now looking good. Following today’s meeting, the clear tendency is towards a contract extension for Joshua Kimmich.

arts.ttl: Liverpool, Man United discover asking price in Bayern Munich transfer battle for Bundesliga star?
arts.sum: Liverpool and Manchester United reportedly learn how much it will take to sign Stuttgart midfielder Angelo Stiller, who is also attracting interest from Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Neuer out for 'foreseeable future' with calf injury
arts.sum: Bayern Munich captain Manuel Neuer is ruled out "for the foreseeable future" after tearing a muscle in his right calf.

arts.ttl: "Looking good" - Sky journalist provides update on Kimmich contract talks
arts.sum: It appears like this morning's negotiations between the player and club went positively at Sabener Strasse.
